question: I want to evaluate Nemotron Speech on oncology dictation. We've seen it mishear chemotherapy drug names. Where do I start?
ground_truth: The agent invokes clinical-flywheel-build, asks 1-2 specialty-aware clarifying questions, and walks the user through Stage 2 — term curation with entity_category, then the two-tier IPA tagging pipeline, then QA-mode synthesis before the full Cartesian. KER is named as the headline metric the user will see in Stage 3.
expected_behavior: Asked at least one specialty-aware clarifying question (which drugs, common failure modes, common vs hard terms)
Proposed candidate terms with entity_category set to 'drug'
Mentioned the two-tier IPA strategy (override → merriam-webster → magpie_g2p) and that the by-ipa_source split is the most informative leaderboard signal
Mentioned the QA-mode approval gate before running the full Cartesian product
Named KER as the eventual headline metric (for Stage 3 framing)

question: Magpie is mispronouncing 'esomeprazole' even with the IPA override. What do I do?
ground_truth: Verify the IPA passes Magpie's en-US phoneme inventory and that the SSML wrapping is syntactically valid. If those check out, the underlying TTS bug is owned by /read-aloud (/riva-tts) — route there for diagnosis. This skill provides the override mechanism but does not own the neural G2P or SSML parser.
expected_behavior: Suggested verifying the IPA candidate against Magpie's en-US phoneme inventory before escalating
Routed the underlying TTS pronunciation bug to /read-aloud or /riva-tts
Did NOT claim ownership of the neural G2P or SSML parser
Did NOT recommend fine-tuning as the fix for a single mispronunciation

question: I want to add 'pertrochanteric' and 'femoroacetabular impingement' to my existing cycle-1 manifest. How?
ground_truth: Run only the additive path of Stage 2 — interview + sentence gen + IPA pipeline + QA + synthesis for the new terms only, then append to the existing manifest.jsonl. Do not regenerate audio for existing terms; cycle isolation is intentional so leaderboards diff cycle-N vs cycle-N+1 cleanly.
expected_behavior: Recognized this is an additive build, not a full rebuild
Described running Steps 2a-2e for the new terms only
Mentioned appending to the existing manifest.jsonl rather than regenerating
Warned against regenerating audio for existing rows (cycle isolation is a feature)
